Winter mode: Minimum charge set to 60%,:
Winter mode: Minimum charge set to 60%, if SOC ≥55% it drops to 40%.
Summer mode: Minimum charge 10%, maximum charge ${data.feedInMode}%.
Starts the battery calibration process. First, the battery switches to normal operation and waits until the charge drops below <10%. Then the battery's minSOC is set to 99%. Once this value is reached, the adapter resumes normal operation.
Select the direction for the calibration: Select the direction for the calibration process.
At 90%/95%/97%, excess energy is fed int: At 90%/95%/97%, excess energy is fed into the grid when the battery exceeds this SOC. At 100%, no energy is fed into the grid.
